name: Chicken-Egg Breakfast Crunchwrap
purpose: Savory high-satiety breakfast using batch chicken.
instructions: Make a soft scramble from 3 eggs.
Place cheese, eggs, chicken, potatoes, and a little sauce on lavash.
Fold edges toward the center to make a closed crunchwrap.
Toast seam-side down in pan for 2-3 minutes, then flip and toast 2 minutes more.
Alternative: Ninja 190°C for 5-7 minutes seam-side down.
reheating: Reheat only if assembled shortly before eating; Ninja 180°C for 2-3 minutes.
substitutions: Turkey chili mince can replace chicken, but it becomes a turkey breakfast crunchwrap.
meal_prep_notes: Prepare breakfast kits with chicken/potato/cheese; add eggs fresh.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: Savory, protein-heavy breakfast aligned with user's satiety preference.
